label: 带孔拉伸
description: 将外轮廓 profile 减去若干孔洞 profile 后沿 Z 轴拉伸。何时用：一次成型带孔的板/面板（螺孔、通风口框、镂空面板），比先拉伸再 difference 更省事。
description-en: Extrude an outer profile with one or more hole profiles subtracted. Use when: making a perforated plate/panel in one step (bolt holes, vent frame, cut-out panel) instead of extrude-then-difference.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（必须含 outer_id 与全部 hole_ids 所指 profile）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry; must contain the outer_id and all hole_ids profiles.

inputs.name: outer_id
inputs.label: 外轮廓 id
inputs.description: 外轮廓 profile id；从上游 Profile 节点的 id 输出连入
inputs.description-en: Id of the outer profile. Feed from an upstream Profile node's `id` output.

inputs.name: hole_ids
inputs.label: 孔洞 id 列表
inputs.description: 孔洞 profile id 列表，用逗号/空格/分号分隔；每个来自一个上游 Profile 节点的 id
inputs.description-en: Delimited list (comma/space/semicolon) of hole profile ids; each from an upstream Profile node's `id`.

inputs.name: height
inputs.label: 高度
inputs.description: 沿 Z 的拉伸高度（米）

inputs.name: center
inputs.label: 居中
inputs.description: true = 关于 Z=0 居中

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 本结果的自定义 id；空 = 自动 ext{n}

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加带孔实体后的 Geometry
outputs.description-en: Geometry after appending the perforated solid.

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行 shape 的 id（供下游引用）；引用失败时为空串
outputs.description-en: Id of the new shape (for downstream refs). Empty string when a ref failed.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: outer_id / 任一 hole_id 缺失或找不到时的原因；非空表示未追加任何几何，批次仍可能报 ok，务必读取
outputs.description-en: Reason when outer_id or any hole_id is missing or not found. Non-empty means nothing was appended even though the batch may report ok — always read it.
